topics.title: Europe braces for dangerous heat
topics.summary: A severe heatwave is pushing into central, eastern and southern Europe, with forecasts above 40°C in some cities and officials issuing warnings and opening cooling centres.
topics.discussionPrompt: When heat starts changing ordinary routines, should cities focus more on emergency alerts, or redesign streets and homes for hotter summers?

topics.title: Paraguay shocks Germany at World Cup
topics.summary: Paraguay knocked Germany out of the World Cup on penalties after a 1-1 draw, with goalkeeper Orlando Gill making key saves in Foxborough.
topics.discussionPrompt: Penalty shootouts are dramatic, but are they a fair way to decide a huge match, or just a nerve-wracking lottery?

topics.title: Morocco beats Netherlands on penalties
topics.summary: Morocco defeated the Netherlands 3-2 on penalties after a 1-1 World Cup draw, setting up a last-16 match against Canada in Houston.
topics.discussionPrompt: What makes an underdog run so fun to watch: the surprise, the fan energy, or the feeling that anything can happen?

topics.title: Oil forecasts ease after Hormuz reopening
topics.summary: A Reuters poll found analysts lowering 2026 oil price forecasts as the Strait of Hormuz reopening eases supply worries after earlier conflict-driven disruptions.
topics.discussionPrompt: It is strange how one shipping route can affect prices everywhere. Do energy markets feel too fragile, or just naturally connected?
